attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_BOM_COMPONENTS_B)

FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_BOM_COMPONENTS_B STG_CG1_BOM_COMPONENTS_B,
 (
 select COMPONENT_SEQUENCE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_BOM_COMPONENTS_B
 minus
 select COMPONENT_SEQUENCE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_BOM_COMPONENTS_B
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.COMPONENT_SEQUENCE_ID = STG_CG1_BOM_COMPONENTS_B.COMPONENT_SEQUENCE_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_BOM_COMPONENTS_B.REFRESH_DATETIME
